summary: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.7, a model for advanced software engineering tasks
OpenAI releases GPT-5.4-Cyber, a model fine-tuned for defensive cybersecurity work
Adobe launches Firefly AI assistant, a public beta AI tool to automate tasks using Creative Cloud apps
Google updated Gemini API with new models, including Gemini 3.1 Pro, Flash, and Nano Banana
Pydantic AI released version 1.82.0 with bug fixes and new features
Vercel AI released @ai-sdk/workflow version 1.0.0-beta.5 with new features and improvements
Gupshup launched Superagent, an autonomous AI agent for customer conversations at scale
Azure released Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses library for building AI-powered applications
Databricks expands agent governance with Unity AI Gateway, enhancing control and observability for agentic AI
GrowthLoop launches Composable AI Decisioning, a data cloud-native platform for marketers to understand customer behavior
OpenClaw releases version 2026.4.15-beta.1, featuring model auth status and cloud storage support
ggml-org releases llama.cpp version b8797, with optimizations for HMX matmul and hexagon
langchain-ai releases @langchain/google-common version 2.1.27, with patch changes and updated dependencies
SolarWinds launches SW1, an agentic AI teammate for IT automation and observability
Microsoft releases MAI-Image-2-Efficient, a text-to-image model with improved efficiency
NVIDIA introduces Ising, an AI model for building quantum processors
Google DeepMind releases Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6, a model for embodied reasoning in robotics
anthropics releases claude-code version 2.1.108, with added features and improvements for the agentic coding tool
Databricks launches Agent Bricks, a governed enterprise agent platform unifying data, models, and governance
Astreya launches AI OpsHub, a pioneering platform for hybrid IT management and AI adoption
pipecat-ai releases pipecat version 1.0.0, a framework for voice and multimodal conversational AI
AWS launches AI-powered application to accelerate drug development and research
Khoros launches Aurora AI, an AI-native reimagining of the Khoros Community platform for enterprise community management
MiniMax launches MiniMax-M1, the world's first open-source, large-scale, hybrid-attention reasoning model
Hugging Face releases Sentence Transformers v5.4.0 with multimodal support
Meta releases Muse Spark, its first new AI model since hiring Alexandr Wang
C3 AI launches C3 Code, an enterprise AI development platform turning natural language into production-grade applications
CrewAI releases version 1.14.0 with improved checkpointing and security features
MongoDB introduces Flat Indexes for improved multitenancy support in vector search
Google DeepMind launched Gemma 4, a series of open-source models with up to 31B parameters
Microsoft launched an open-source toolkit for governing autonomous AI agents
LocalAI releases version 4.1.3, with bug fixes and dependency updates for the open-source AI engine
